_comment: 畫風設定。checkpoint 目前為佔位字串，請於 ComfyUI 安裝 .safetensors 後，於後台選單選擇實際模型，或直接填入此處。width/height/steps/cfg/sampler/scheduler 為 base_txt2img workflow 的預設 patch 值。

styles.name: 柔和戀愛 AVG 風
styles.positive_prefix: masterpiece, best quality, score_7, safe, highly detailed, soft lighting, pastel color palette, gentle shading, romance visual novel style, dreamy atmosphere, clean lineart, beautiful detailed eyes
styles.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name, lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra fingers, fused fingers, text, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, blurry, deformed, disfigured, mutated, ugly, nsfw

styles.name: 現代手機遊戲立繪風
styles.positive_prefix: masterpiece, best quality, ultra detailed, mobile game character art, gacha game illustration, vivid colors, sharp focus, dynamic lighting, intricate costume details, glossy rendering, cinematic, full body splash art
styles.negative_prompt: lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra fingers, fused fingers, text, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, blurry, deformed, disfigured, mutated, ugly, worst quality, low quality, flat color, sketch, nsfw

styles.name: 淡彩日系插圖風
styles.positive_prefix: masterpiece, best quality, japanese illustration, light watercolor, soft pastel tones, delicate linework, airy atmosphere, gentle gradient, minimal shading, slice of life, warm natural light
